response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including geospatial data through her GISCollective project. However, her primary expertise lies in scripting languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js) and D, with limited demonstrated experience in C++ or Rust, which are critical for this role. Her background in system-level programming or low-latency applications is not strongly evident.
strengths: Strong geospatial data experience with GISCollective platform (Node.js, Ember.js, D)
Proven track record in full-stack development and optimization across diverse tech stacks
Experience with distributed systems and real-time data processing (e.g., Dunnhumby media)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages for this role
No clear evidence of working on routing/navigation systems or routing data pipelines
Background skews toward web/mobile development rather than low-latency system programming
